description: Bill of divorce (get). Location: Al-Saʿdiyya, a part of Ṣanʿāʾ in Yemen, based on the landmarks listed: בירין דמיין נבעין דילה. This locational designation appears in a variety of other documents issued in Ṣanʿā, for example: Sassoon 1055a (PGPID 911), Moss. VII,19 (PGPID 18637). Dated: 29 Tishrei 2023 Seleucid = 12 October 1711 CE. Husband: Yehuda b. Muʿawwiḍa. Wife: Zahra bt. Yaḥyā. Witnesses include: Zekharya b. Yosef. Verso: A separate document is visible through the back of the paper, which may have been pasted to the recto itself or the piece of archival cardboard that is visible around the edges of the recto/verso. When inverting the verso text as a mirror image, the name Yaḥya b. Yahuda al-Ṣafīra becomes legible in line 1. Subsequent lines deal with a house, perhaps a real estate transaction. Requires further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
